title: NotEnoughIDs Unofficial
description: Extended Block IDs and Metadata for Minecraft 1.7.10
body:
This project is an unofficial continuation of NotEnoughIDs for Minecraft 1.7.10.

It is largely completely re-written, and supports the same features as the original. With the exception that we also extend Metadata to be 16-bits. This is helpful for other mods to leverage for features that might otherwise require tile entities with more complex custom NBT.

This mod is drop-in compatible with original NotEnoughIDs worlds, however should not be used at the same time as the original NotEnoughIDs, it should only be included as a replacement.

**VERSIONS PRIOR TO 2.0 DO NOT EXTEND THE METADATA.**
Versions 1.5.X have identical functionality to the original mod, but in our re-written version. The metadata was not extended until version 2.0

Licensed under the LGPL - Use this however you want but please give back modifications
